basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) has officially announced the Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Hyderabad website. Candidates up to 40 years of age holding a Ph.D. in Bioinformatics or Computational Biology can submit their online applications until 31 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC as per standard government norms.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic records and relevant work experience Online Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Hyderabad Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) position is 31st July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Bioinformatics or Computational Biology to be eligible for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) position at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxations will be provided for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000/- per month, plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) post at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic records and relevant work experience, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The appointment will be on a contract basis for the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification carefully before applying.
